text: DALLAS 1935 Medical District Drive Dallas TX 75235 HussainKhail, Imran Ahmad. Visit date: 7/21/2025. Results Follow-Up in Dallas Endocrinology.
Current Medications include lidocaine-prilocaine cream, hyoscyamine, magnesium oxide, ondansetron, polyethylene glycol, cyanocobalamin, hydrocortisone, and fludrocortisone.
Current Medications continued include levETIRAcetam, diazePAM, Lacosamide, potassium chloride, cetirizine, pyridoxine, hydrocortisone, and fludrocortisone.
Provider Notes: Normal lytes, other labs in process. ACTH level is still high after stress dosing. Renin is elevated. Increase baseline hydrocortisone and fludrocortisone. Repeat labs in 4 weeks.
Nursing Notes: mom reports patient is very tired, his color changes quickly, his lips are dry, and he is thirsty. Provider will follow up through MyChart.
If symptoms persist, go to the ER for evaluation. See if the lab can add on an A1c. Other labs are in process.
